details.content:
Great question! You've got 2 Legacy Benches with Feet coming — those are the real deal, and they're substantial pieces. Each bench is about 5 feet wide, 3 feet tall, and weighs around 120 pounds.

**You'll definitely want to bring a truck, trailer, or large SUV.** A regular sedan won't cut it, but if you've got access to a truck or trailer, you're golden. Both benches together will need some space, but our team at the warehouse will help you load up!

Are you all set to schedule your pickup, or do you have other questions about the event?
What vehicle do I need for my items?

Perfect question! Here's what you'll need:

**Just bring yourself and your truck!** When you arrive at the warehouse, you'll show us the QR code from your receipt — that's all we need to locate your items and get them loaded up. Our team will have your order ready and will help you load those benches.

Since you're coming from Omaha (about 71 minutes away), you might want to grab a drink before the drive back, but otherwise you're all set!

Ready to book your pickup time? You can choose from Thursday (12pm-8pm), Friday (10am-8pm), or Saturday (10am-7pm).

[button:Schedule My Pickup|/pickup/0f0f18fbc14b]
What do I need to bring other than a truck?

That's a great question! Unfortunately, I don't have access to weather forecasts, so I can't tell you what it'll be like on April 16-18. I'd definitely recommend checking a weather app closer to your pickup date—especially since you're bringing a truck or trailer for those Legacy Benches, you'll want to know if it'll be rainy or sunny!

Is there anything else I can help with about your pickup? 🌩️
What is the weather going to be like on those pickup days?

Absolutely! You can reach our team at **support@raregoods.com**. They'll be happy to help with whatever you need!

[button:Contact Support|mailto:support@raregoods.com]
I'd like to email a person, can you give me an email for support?
i need to resechule pickup

No problem at all! I can help you reschedule. Let me pull up your available times for you.

[button:Reschedule My Time|https://huskerpickup.raregoods.com/pickup/cf0ac57b3480]

Ha! Great question — I'd say wear something comfortable and maybe avoid your best Husker gear since you might get a little dusty loading those benches! 😄 

Since you're picking up 2 Legacy Benches, a Premium End-Row Seat Pair, and 3 Standard Arena Seats, you'll definitely want to dress for some light lifting. Closed-toe shoes are always a good call at the warehouse too.

Is there anything else I can help with before your Saturday pickup?
what should I wear?

Ha! I love the optimism — unfortunately no ice cream at the warehouse, but you'll be walking away with some amazing pieces of Husker history, which is pretty sweet if you ask me! 🏟️

Once you get those Legacy Benches set up at home though, you could definitely have a watch party with snacks while you're sitting in authentic Devaney Center seats. That sounds like a win to me!

Anything else I can help with for your Saturday pickup?
will there be ice cream?
write an excel formula to merge columns a and b

Ha! That's a fun question, but I'm really just here to help with your Husker legacy seating pickup! 😄 Excel formulas aren't exactly my wheelhouse — I'm all about getting you and those iconic Devaney Center seats together.

Is there anything else about your Saturday pickup at 2:00pm that I can help with? You've got some awesome items coming your way!
hey before I can come pick these up, but in order for me to get in the car so I am not late, i just need that help quickly

I totally get it — you're trying to get out the door on time! But Excel formulas really aren't my thing, and I don't want to give you bad info that slows you down even more. 😅

For that, you'd be better off doing a quick Google search or asking ChatGPT — they'll get you the right answer way faster than I can.

But for your pickup? I've got you covered! You're all set for Saturday, April 18 at 2:00pm in Roca (about 15 minutes from Benedict). Just bring a truck or large SUV for those benches and seats, show your QR code when you arrive, and our crew will take care of you.

Safe travels, and Go Big Red! 🌽
Hey its me jumping in the forumla is GOOLE IT
okay

Awesome! You're all set for your pickup. If you need anything else before Saturday — directions, questions about your items, or anything Husker-related — just holler!

Go Big Red! 🌽
Reschedule pickup

Perfect! Let me pull up your available pickup times for you.

[button:Schedule My Pickup|/pickup/06335f2933a9]

Just head to that link and you'll see all the open slots for Thursday (April 16), Friday (April 17), and Saturday (April 18). Pick whatever works best with your schedule — and remember, you've got a 30-minute window to load up your Premium Black Wall Mount!
Reschedule

I'd be happy to help you reschedule! Let me pull up your available pickup times.

[button:Reschedule My Time|https://huskerpickup.raregoods.com/pickup/06335f2933a9]

Just a heads up — you've got one reschedule available, so pick the time that works best for you! The event runs Thursday (12pm-8pm), Friday (10am-8pm), and Saturday (10am-7pm) at our Roca warehouse.

Unfortunately, the pickup event is only happening those three days — April 16-18. But we've got plenty of time slots across Thursday, Friday, and Saturday, so hopefully one of those works for you!

If none of those dates are going to work, let me connect you with our team and they can explore options with you.
Can I pick up on a different date?
Those dates don't work

I totally understand — let me get our team involved to help figure this out.

[button:Contact Support|mailto:support@raregoods.com]

Reach out to them and let them know those dates won't work for you. They'll be able to discuss alternative pickup arrangements or other solutions. They're great about working with folks!
I am out of state at a meeting during the pickup times. Can I schedule a different day?

I totally understand — those dates work great for folks local to Lincoln, but I know that's a tough drive from Dakota Dunes! Unfortunately, the pickup event is only happening **Thursday April 16 through Saturday April 18**, so we don't have dates outside that window available.

Here's what I'd suggest: Do you think you could swing down for one of those three days, maybe earlier or later in the window to fit your schedule? The times are pretty flexible — we've got slots from noon to 8pm on Thursday, and 10am to 8pm Friday and Saturday. 

Or if that's really not workable, let me connect you with our team to see if there's any way we can work something out on your end.

[button:Contact Support|mailto:support@raregoods.com]
This item was supposed to be shipped. How do I arrange for the shipping?

I hear you, Rob — let me clarify what I'm seeing on your end. Your order shows a Standard Arena Seat that's set up for in-person pickup at our warehouse in Roca, Nebraska (just south of Lincoln).

Here's the thing: those arena seats are pretty substantial — about 50 lbs each — so they really do need to be picked up in person rather than shipped. They're authentic pieces from Devaney Center, and we want to make sure they arrive in perfect condition!

That said, if there was a mix-up with your order or you had a different arrangement discussed, I want to make sure we get it sorted. Can you tell me a bit more about what you expected? Was there communication about shipping when you originally ordered? If so, let me connect you with our team who can review your account and see what happened.

[button:Contact Support|mailto:support@raregoods.com]
I specifically requested shipping. I live in Maryland. I can’t pick it up.

Rob, I totally understand — Maryland to Nebraska is a trek, and that's a legitimate issue. You definitely made a reasonable request for shipping, and I want to make sure we honor that.

Here's what I need to do: this sounds like it needs to be escalated to our team so they can review your original request and see what happened on our end. They'll be able to look at your order details, confirm what you asked for, and work out the right solution — whether that's arranging shipping or exploring other options that work for you.

Let me get you connected with them right now.

[button:Contact Support|mailto:support@raregoods.com]
I am unable to make the pickup times noted.  I will be able to pickup the order the following weekend, April 24-25.

I totally understand — that's a long drive from West Fargo! Unfortunately, we only have pickup available during the official event weekend (April 16-18), so April 24-25 won't work for our warehouse setup.

Here's what I'd suggest: let me connect you with our support team. They may be able to work out a special arrangement given the distance, or explore other options like having someone else pick it up for you. They're really good about helping fans in situations like yours.

[button:Contact Support|mailto:support@raregoods.com]
How much does the seat weigh

Your Standard Arena Seat weighs about 50 lbs — totally manageable for one person to handle, but you'll definitely want an SUV or minivan to transport it safely. The good news is a single seat fits pretty easily in most vehicles!

Do you have any other questions about your pickup on Saturday?

Perfect! You're all set for Saturday at 11:30am. Just bring your receipt (you can show the QR code on your phone), and our team at the warehouse will have your seat ready to load up.

Go Big Red! 🌽
No

For your Legacy Bench with Feet, you'll definitely want to bring a truck, trailer, or large SUV — this beauty is about 5 feet wide, 3 feet tall, and weighs around 120 pounds, so it's a serious piece of Husker history! A regular sedan won't cut it for this one.

You're about an hour from our warehouse in Roca, so plan accordingly and make sure you've got the space secured before you head down.

[button:Schedule My Pickup|https://huskerpickup.raregoods.com/pickup/41b35667da7f]
What vehicle do I need for my items?

Great question! Here's how it works: once you schedule your pickup time on your pickup page, you'll get a receipt with your QR code right there. You'll show that QR code to our team when you arrive during your 30-minute window, and they'll have your Legacy Bench ready to load up.

Right now you haven't scheduled yet — so the first step is to pick your time slot for April 16–18. Once you do that, your receipt with the QR code will be all set!

[button:Schedule My Pickup|https://huskerpickup.raregoods.com/pickup/41b35667da7f]
where do I get the qr code to pickup my item
I will be having someone pick up this order on my behalf. This person will have the QR code that you sent me. Is there anything else she needs?

Perfect! Your friend just needs to bring that QR code (she can show it on her phone or print it out), and our warehouse team will take care of the rest. They'll locate your Legacy Bench by the warehouse label and help load it up.

Just one heads up — since you're picking up a Legacy Bench with Feet, she should make sure to bring a truck, trailer, or large SUV. That bench is about 5 feet wide, 3 feet tall, and around 120 pounds, so it'll need some space to haul it safely.

She's all set! See you Friday at noon. Go Big Red! 🌽

Great question! Your Legacy Bench with Feet is roughly **5 feet wide by 3 feet tall**, and it weighs around **120 pounds**. It's a solid piece of Husker history — those are two authentic Devaney Center arena seats rebuilt into a collectible bench.

Since you're coming from Washington, just make sure you've got a truck, trailer, or large SUV ready to load it up. It's definitely a two-person job! 

Anything else you need to know before Thursday?
What are the dimensions?

Perfect — that's totally fine! Your parents just need to bring your receipt (they can show the QR code on their phone or print it out) when they arrive, and our team will get them set up at your scheduled time on Thursday at 6:00pm.

Your pickup label is **B55**, so the warehouse crew will have your Legacy Bench ready to go. Just remind them to bring a truck or trailer — that bench is a beast!

Is there anything else I can help with?
The order is under my name, Nema Koohmaraie. But it will actually be my parents picking it up. Please confirm that is okay, and won’t be an issue.

That's a great practical question! Honestly, a Legacy Bench with Feet is pretty large (~5ft wide x 3ft tall x ~120lbs), so a standard SUV might be tight depending on the model. A full-size SUV like a Tahoe, Suburban, or similar would be your best bet — you'd want to drop the back seats and have good clearance.

That said, a truck or trailer is really the safest call to avoid any damage to the bench or your parents' vehicle. Do your parents have access to either of those? If not, they should definitely double-check their specific SUV's dimensions before Thursday to make sure it'll fit comfortably.
What kind of SUV does it fit in?

That's a really good follow-up question! I don't have the exact depth measurement for the Legacy Bench in my info — I've got the width (~5ft) and height (~3ft), but the depth spec isn't in front of me.

Let me connect you with our team so they can give you the precise depth measurement. That way your parents can nail down whether their vehicle will work before Thursday.

[button:Contact Support|mailto:support@raregoods.com]
What is the depth measurement

You're welcome! Good luck with the pickup on Thursday — your parents are going to love having that piece of Devaney history. Go Big Red! 🌽

If you need anything else before then, just let me know!
Thanks

Perfect! That works great. Your friend just needs to bring your receipt — they can show it on their phone (the QR code) or print it out. Here's a quick link to pull up your receipt:

[button:View My Receipt|/pickup/057036040ef5]

Your item (Premium End-Row Seat Pair) will be at warehouse label **E10 on the dock**. Just remind your friend to bring a truck, trailer, or large SUV — those end-row seats are bulky! And they should plan to arrive during your 10:30am Saturday window.

Anything else I can help with?
I have a friend picking this up for me
